mapper.select: /* SQL ID : AsmntDAO.selectFdbk 설 명 : 피드백 조회 */ SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY FRST_INQ_DTTM) AS LINE_NO , COUNT(ASMT_FDBK_ID) OVER() AS TOTAL_CNT , ASMT_FDBK_ID , UP_ASMT_FDBK_ID , ASMT_ID , FDBK_TRGT_CD , STD_ID , TEAM_ID , FDBK_CTS , DELYN , RGTRNM , RGTR_ID , FRST_INQ_DTTM , MDFR_ID , MOD_DTTM FROM TB_LMS_ASMNT_FDBK WHERE ASMT_ID = #{asmtId} AND STD_ID = #{stdNo} AND DELYN = 'N' ORDER BY FRST_INQ_DTTM DESC LIMIT #{firstIndex}, #{listScale}

/* SQL ID : AsmntDAO.selectAsmntList 설 명 : */ SELECT SCHDL.SBJCT_ID , ASMT.ASMT_ID , ASMT.INDV_ASMTYN , ASMT.TEAM_ASMT_STNGYN , ASMT.LRN_GRP_ID , ASMT.ASMT_GBNCD FROM TB_LMS_LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL SCHDL LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_ASMT ASMT ON SCHDL.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID = ASMT.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID WHERE ASMT.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId}

/* SQL ID : AsmntDAO.selectChkUpdateStd 설 명 : 신규수강생 조회 */ SELECT ATNDLC.USER_ID , ATNDLC.ATNDLC_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC ATNDLC JOIN TB_LMS_USER U ON U.USER_ID = ATNDLC.USER_ID AND U.USER_STSCD = 'U' JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT OFRNG ON OFRNG.SBJCT_ID = ATNDLC.SBJCT_ID AND OFRNG.USEYN = 'Y' AND OFRNG.DELYN = 'N' JOIN TB_LMS_ASMT ASMT ON ASMT.ASMT_ID = #{asmtId} AND ASMT.DELYN = 'N' WHERE ATNDLC.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND ATNDLC.ATNDLC_STSCD NOT IN ('NONATNDLC') AND NVL(ATNDLC.AUDITYN, 'N') = 'N' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN T1 WHERE T1.ASMT_ID = ASMT.ASMT_ID AND T1.USER_ID = ATNDLC.USER_ID AND T1.DELYN = 'N' )

/* SQL ID : AsmntDAO.selectChkDeleteStd 설 명 : 삭제수강생조회 */ SELECT DISTINCT SBMSN.USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN SBMSN JOIN TB_LMS_ASMT ASMT ON ASMT.ASMT_ID = SBMSN.ASMT_ID AND ASMT.DELYN = 'N' WHERE SBMSN.ASMT_ID = #{asmtId} AND SBMSN.DELYN = 'N' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC T1 JOIN TB_LMS_USER T2 ON T2.USER_ID = T1.USER_ID AND T2.USER_STSCD = 'U' WHERE T1.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND T1.USER_ID = SBMSN.USER_ID AND T2.USER_STSCD = 'ACTV' AND T1.ATNDLC_STSCD NOT IN ('NONATNDLC') AND NVL(T1.AUDITYN, 'N') = 'N' )
/* SQL ID : AsmntDAO.listAsmntByTeamCtgrCd 설 명 : 팀 분류코드와 연결된 과제 목록 조회 */ SELECT ASMT_ID FROM TB_LMS_ASMT WHERE DELYN = 'N' AND TEAM_TYCD = #{lrnGrpId}

/* SQL ID : AsmntDAO.listMutEval 설 명 : 상호평가 목록 조회 */ SELECT A.ASMT_SBMSN_ID , A.ASMT_ID , A.SCR , A.SCR_CMNT , A.RGTR_ID , (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE ORG_ID = D.ORG_ID AND USER_ID = A.RGTR_ID) AS RGTRNM , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM , (SELECT PHT_FILE FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = A.RGTR_ID) AS PHT_FILE_BYTE FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_MTL_EVL A JOIN TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN B ON A.ASMT_SBMSN_ID = B.ASMT_SBMSN_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N' JOIN TB_LMS_ASMT C ON B.ASMT_ID = C.ASMT_ID AND C.DELYN = 'N' JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT D ON C.SBJCT_ID = D.SBJCT_ID AND D.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND D.AUDITYN = 'N' AND A.RGTR_ID = D.USER_ID AND D.ORG_ID = #{orgId} WHERE A.ASMT_SBMSN_ID = #{asmtSbmsnId} AND 1 = ( CASE WHEN C.TEAM_ASMNT_CFG_YN = 'Y' AND C.TEAM_EVAL_YN = 'Y' THEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_TEAM_MBR AA WHERE AA.TEAM_ID = B.TEAM_ID AND AA.USER_ID = D.USER_ID ) ELSE 1 END ) ORDER BY A.FRST_INQ_DTTM DESC

/* SQL ID : AsmntDAO.selectAsmnt 설 명 : 과제 조회 */ SELECT A.ASMT_ID , A.SBJCT_ID , A.ASMT_CTGRCD , A.ASMT_TTL , A.ASMT_CTS , A.SEND_START_DTTM , A.SEND_END_DTTM , A.PRTC_YN , A.SEND_TYPE , A.SBMT_FILE_TYPE , A.ASMNT_OPEN_YN , A.EXT_SEND_ACPT_YN , A.EXT_SEND_DTTM , A.TEAM_ASMNT_CFG_YN , A.TEAM_TYCD , A.TEAM_EVAL_YN , A.MEMBER_SUBMIT_YN , A.EVAL_USE_YN , A.EVL_SDTTM , A.EVL_EDTTM , A.EVL_CTGRCD , A.EVL_RSLT_OYN , A.EVL_CRTR_USEYN , A.MRK_RFLTYN , A.MRK_RFLTRT , A.MRK_OYN , A.VIEW_SCORE_DTTM , A.AVG_OPEN_YN , A.DVCLAS_REGYN , A.PUSH_NOTIYN , A.SBMT_OPEN_YN , A.SBMT_START_DTTM , A.SBMT_END_DTTM , A.IND_YN , A.RESEND_START_DTTM , A.RESEND_END_DTTM , A.RESCORE_RATIO , A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID , A.DELYN , A.REG_YN , A.RGTR_ID , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM FROM TB_LMS_ASMT A WHERE A.ASMT_ID = #{asmtId}
